name: claude-context-manager
description: Persistent memory for Claude Code sessions

scripts.build: npm run build:tailwind && npm run build:src && npm run build:hooks && npm run build:cli && npm run build:web
scripts.build:tailwind: echo '@tailwind base;@tailwind components;@tailwind utilities;' | tailwindcss -i - -o web/client/vendor/tailwind.css --config web/tailwind.config.js --minify
scripts.build:plugin: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && node scripts/install.js
scripts.dev: nodemon --watch src --ext ts --exec "npm run build && (launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'com.mrlesmithjr.context-manager$' && make server-launchd-install || echo '[dev] Native server not running -- skipping restart. Rebuilt successfully.') && echo '[dev] Rebuilt. Restart Claude Code + /plugin update context-manager for hook changes to take effect."

author: Larry Smith Jr. <mrlesmithjr@gmail.com>
